brand.name: Optimize3D
brand.positioning: Industrial 3D point-cloud data company for field decisions, quality inspection, reverse engineering, and robotics

hero.eyebrow: Connecting 3D scan data to field decisions and execution data
hero.title: Optimize3D
hero.body: Optimize3D is a field-focused 3D point-cloud data company that connects spaces in shipbuilding, offshore, manufacturing, and construction sites to AI analysis, quality decisions, reverse engineering, and robotics.

dataStack.title: Field Data Capture
dataStack.body: Point clouds, CAD, photos, inspection criteria, and workspace constraints are organized by project.

dataStack.title: AI Analysis & Spatial Reasoning
dataStack.body: Segmentation, feature extraction, deviation candidates, collision risks, and accessibility are computed as usable data.

dataStack.title: Inspection, Fabrication & Robot Execution
dataStack.body: The results are delivered as inspection reports, CAD reconstruction, jig concepts, and robot simulation inputs.
